title: Real Time Chatbot for Retail Store
description: Development of a real-time chatbot designed to assist customers in a retail store environment. The chatbot should be capable of handling customer inquiries, providing product information, and facilitating sales interactions in real time.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Real Time Chatbot for Retail Store (DEM-2026-0106)

Executive Summary
This project aims to develop a real-time chatbot to enhance customer service in retail stores by providing instant assistance, product information, and sales support. The solution will improve customer engagement and streamline in-store interactions.

Business Value/Impact
Implementing the chatbot will increase customer satisfaction and drive higher sales conversion rates by offering timely, accurate responses. It will also reduce staff workload, allowing employees to focus on complex customer needs.

Risk Mitigation
To address medium risks, the project will include thorough testing, user training, and ongoing monitoring to ensure chatbot accuracy and reliability. Contingency plans will be established to handle technical issues promptly.

Global resource utilization: 480/520 total weekly effort units currently allocated.
